text.tspan: Share of the population using at least basic sanitation services, 2022

Basic sanitation services are defined as
improved sanitation
facilities not shared with other households.
Data source: WHO/UNICEF Joint Monitoring Programme for Water Supply, Sanitation and Hygiene (JMP) (2024)
